pr.title: Fix Digital Asset Links on GitHub Pages
pr.body:
## Summary
- Add `docs/.nojekyll` so GitHub Pages serves dot-directories; Jekyll was ignoring `.well-known/assetlinks.json` and returning 404.
- Add a third SHA-256 fingerprint for a second PC's debug signing key so Credential Manager password save works on that machine too.

## Test plan
- [ ] Merge and wait for GitHub Pages rebuild
- [ ] Confirm `https://melkor217.github.io/rock-paper-scissors/.well-known/assetlinks.json` returns 200 with all three fingerprints
- [ ] Install a debug build from the second PC and verify the system offers to save email/password after sign-in


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: melkor217
